name: browser_video_show_actions
description: Annotate subsequent actions performed on the page with a callout that names the action and highlights the target element. Useful while video recording or screencasting.

duration.description: How long each action annotation stays on screen, in milliseconds. Defaults to 500.

position.description: Where to place the action title relative to the page. Defaults to top-right.

cursor.description: Cursor decoration for pointer actions. "pointer" (default) animates a mouse pointer from the previous action point to the next one; "none" disables the cursor decoration.
